message:
The other day, my kids were at it again—arguing over who gets to walk our dog first. I mean, you'd think they were competing for the Olympic gold medal in dog-walking! 🐶 After a few minutes of back-and-forth, I decided to step in and settle the debate. We made a quick list of who walks when, and I even threw in some fun tasks like 'who can teach the dog the best trick.' 

It was a win-win! Not only did it diffuse the tension, but it also got us all thinking about how to work as a team—something we might need to do in case of any surprises at home. You never know when a little organization can go a long way! 

Have you ever had to mediate a sibling showdown? What worked for you?
